summary: M7-SAVE-MIGRATION-CLOUD-BOUNDARIES-001 is CLOSED after PR #189 passed CI, merged, and entered origin/main at 10f3fd7ff866e6cbee26b58d08036dd70fb9bb6b. The task added local M7 save migration compatibility boundaries for accepted M1-M6 saves, kept M7 Beta content-lock candidate manifests on the Human Gate path, and kept cloud save candidate-only with no account/network/telemetry/secrets/provider implementation.

tests_run.result: Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed in 2m42s; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed in 1m3s.

tests_run.command: git fetch origin --prune; git checkout main; git pull --ff-only origin main; git log -1 --oneline --decorate

decisions.decision: Mark task CLOSED only after PR #189 passed CI, merged, and origin/main contained the accepted changes.
Next dependency-ready M7 tasks are large-scale balance, performance/memory/loading, and UI regression matrix. Selection will be recomputed before starting the next task.
No Human Gate is active; cloud-save enablement, irreversible migration, account/network persistence, telemetry/accounts/secrets, and frozen save/platform decisions remain Human Gates.

risks.summary: Formal M7 content lock acceptance remains a future Human Gate and is not approved by this task.
risks.mitigation: M7 candidate manifests remain human-gate-required until formal acceptance.

risks.summary: Balance, performance/loading, and UI regression validation tasks remain open.
risks.mitigation: Continue to the next dependency-ready M7 task after closure enters main.

requested_action: Merge closure checkpoint, sync main, then start the next READY M7 task without asking for continuation unless a Human Gate appears.
